TestCase z20Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    int* follow_case_list = (int*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(int));
    memcpy(follow_case_list, t1.list, t1.n * sizeof(int));
    follow_case.list = follow_case_list;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive code: ensure there is at least one element
    if (follow_case.n == 0) {
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Reverse subarray from index i to j (here we reverse the whole array)
    int i = 0;
    int j = follow_case.n - 1;
    while (i < j) {
        int temp = follow_case.list[i];
        follow_case.list[i] = follow_case.list[j];
        follow_case.list[j] = temp;
        i++;
        j--;
    }
    
    return follow_case;
}
